steps.title: Mark the genre contrast
steps.content: The first sentence says Porter's focus and tone varied by genre. The poetry is described as heartfelt and centered on natural beauty, while the journalism uses humor and satire on political issues. The transition must signal contrast.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast transitions
steps.content:
• Choice A signals restatement, but the journalism is not just a rewording of the poetry description.
  • Choice B signals concession, which does not fit the sentence's parallel contrast.
  • Choice C signals similarity, the opposite of the stated variation by genre.
The answer is D.
